'''halutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:feastinge|feastinge]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-l-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:feastinge|feastinge]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| halutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hælitith|hælitith]] || [[word:hælitij|hælitij]] || [[word:hælitish|hælitish]] || [[word:hæliti|hæliti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:halulututh|halulututh]] || [[word:halulutuj|halulutuj]] || [[word:halulutush|halulutush]] || [[word:halulutu|halulutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:halututh|halututh]] || [[word:halutuj|halutuj]] || [[word:halutush|halutush]] || [[word:halutu|halutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:haluftuth|haluftuth]] || [[word:haluftuj|haluftuj]] || [[word:haluftush|haluftush]] || [[word:haluftuf|haluftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:halututhu|halututhu]] || [[word:halutuju|halutuju]] || [[word:halutushu|halutushu]] || [[word:halutuku|halutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:halututh|halututh]] || [[word:halutuj|halutuj]] || [[word:halutush|halutush]] || [[word:halutu|halutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:halututhul|halututhul]] || [[word:halutujul|halutujul]] || [[word:halutushul|halutushul]] || [[word:halutukul|halutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:halututhuthu|halututhuthu]] || [[word:halutujuju|halutujuju]] || [[word:halutushushu|halutushushu]] || [[word:halutuku|halutuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:halututhun|halututhun]] || [[word:halutujun|halutujun]] || [[word:halutushun|halutushun]] || [[word:halutukun|halutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:halututhuoro|halututhuoro]] || [[word:halutujuoro|halutujuoro]] || [[word:halutushuoro|halutushuoro]] || [[word:halutukuoro|halutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
